get.summary: Get all community achievements with stats.

post.summary: Start viewing the system as a specific role
post.description: Generates a temporary JWT with the target role while keeping track of the original Admin ID.
Revokes the temporary impersonation context and issues a fresh token with original Admin roles.

get.summary: Get users for the management table
get.description: Fetches a full list of users including their roles, status, and join date. Supports filtering by name/email, specific role, or account status as seen in the Admin Dashboard.

get.summary: Get full user details for modal view
get.description: Retrieves comprehensive information for a specific user, including their profile picture, account status, joining date, and all assigned security roles.

patch.description: Switches the user's account status. If the user is active, they will be deactivated (preventing login). If inactive, they will be activated.

post.description: Updates the assigned roles for a specific user. It automatically adds newly selected roles and removes unchecked ones as per the Manage Roles modal.

get.summary: Get dashboard metrics
get.description: Retrieves key metrics for the Admin Dashboard, including total user count, active users.

get.summary: Get posted content details by type and specific ID
get.description: Fetches item-specific data for a specified record type (Portfolio, CV, Job, Project) to populate details modal views.

delete.summary: Permanently drop a posted content type element from database
delete.description: Exempts specific records permanently across portfolios, cv postings, jobs, or active platform client projects.

post.description: Allows authenticated users to upload a shared image for their profile.

delete.description: Deletes the shared profile image of the authenticated user.

post.summary: Upload a profile image for a specific role
post.description: Allows authenticated users to upload an image for their specific role profile (e.g., Job Seeker, Employer).

delete.summary: Delete profile image for a specific role
delete.description: Deletes the profile image associated with the specified role of the authenticated user.
Removes the user record from the Identity database. This action is irreversible.

get.summary: Search users by name and filter by roles
get.description: Returns a list of users matching the name keyword and belonging to the selected roles for the search results page.

get.summary: Get comprehensive profile summary and cross-referenced sub-ids
get.description: Takes an AppUserId and returns base user data, role names, and cross-referenced profile IDs like JobSeekerId or EmployerId.

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns authentication data
Authenticates user and returns JWT token, refresh token, and user details

get.summary: Refresh access token
get.description: Generates a new access token using refresh token from cookies

post.description: Invalidates the refresh token (logout)
Verifies user email using OTP and activates account
Resends email verification OTP to the user
Allows authenticated users to change their password
Sends password reset instructions to the user's email
Resets user password using reset token
Check Email Exist or Not
Only Employers can add a company

get.summary: Get company details
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

post.description: Only Employers can upload a company logo

post.summary: Upload a document for a company
post.description: Only Employers can upload documents

get.summary: Get all company names for a specific employer
get.description: Retrieves a list of company IDs and Names associated with the given Employer ID. Useful for populating dropdowns or simple lists.

get.summary: Download a company document
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

get.summary: Get an employer's profile
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

get.summary: Get all companies of an employer
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

put.description: Only Employers can update their own profile

post.summary: Enroll the current user in a track.

get.summary: Get the current user's enrollment for a specific track.
Get all enrollments for the current user.
Get total enrollment count for a track (public).

post.description: Only Job Seeker can add a Job Seeker

get.summary: Get job seeker dashboard data
get.description: Returns counts for applied, under review, interviews, and rejected jobs with the full list.

delete.description: Removes the application from the system.

post.description: Only Employers can add a Job Post

get.summary: Retrieve all available job posts
get.description: Fetches a complete list of job postings. Authorized for both Job Seekers and Employers.

get.summary: Get full dashboard data for the employer
get.description: Returns statistics (Active, Closed, Total Applicants) and the list of all job postings for the logged-in employer.

patch.description: Updates the status of a specific job post to 'Closed'. This will move the job from the active list to the closed list in the dashboard.

delete.description: Permanently removes a job posting and its associated applications from the database.

get.summary: Get job post details
get.description: Returns counts for (All, Pending, Shortlisted, Rejected) and the list of applicants.

patch.description: Sets status to 'Interview Scheduled' and saves the date.

get.summary: Get a job seeker's profile
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers themselves and Employers

put.summary: Update the logged-in job seeker's profile
put.description: Only Job Seekers can update their own profile

get.summary: Get all Job skills for a Job Offers
get.description: Accessible by job seekers and employers

get.summary: Get my learner profile (stats, roadmaps, projects, interests).

patch.summary: Update learner bio, address, and learning goals.

get.summary: Get a public learner profile by learner ID.

post.summary: Add an interest to my learner profile.

delete.summary: Remove an interest from my learner profile.

get.summary: Get the CV of a Job Seeker
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

put.summary: Replace the logged-in Job Seeker's CV
put.description: Only Job Seekers can replace their CV

get.summary: Download a CV file by ID
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

get.summary: View a CV file as PDF by ID
get.description: Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

get.summary: View all Public CVs file as PDF
get.description: Returns a list of all CVs marked as public for the gallery and Accessible by Job Seekers and Employers

patch.description: If private: requires JobTitle to make it public. If public: makes it private.

post.description: Accepts a skill profile and returns ranked career track recommendations from the AI model. All numeric skill fields must be between 0 and 9.
Uploads a CV file, processes it through the Railway AI parser, and returns a structured profile object (Title, Experience, Skills, Summary) to automatically auto-fill front-end registration fields.

get.summary: Retrieves all available track names.
Retrieves a roadmap track by name.

delete.summary: Remove a single track and its orphaned nodes.

get.summary: Retrieves all track content (paginated).
get.description: Returns full topic/subtopic data for every track, paginated. Use ?page=1&pageSize=10 to control page size.

get.summary: Searches for roadmap tracks by name (paginated).
get.description: Returns full topic/subtopic data for tracks whose name matches the query, paginated. Use ?page=1&pageSize=10 to control page size.

post.description: Creates a track with topics, subtopics, and resource links.
Triggers the import of all roadmap tracks. Can be cancelled by the Admin.

delete.summary: Remove ALL tracks and nodes. Use with caution.

get.summary: Get all roles
get.description: Returns all roles in the system. Accessible only by Admin users

get.summary: Get public roles
get.description: Returns roles available for public usage (e.g., Job Seeker, Employer)

post.description: Creates a new role in the system. Only accessible by Admin users

delete.description: Deletes a role by its ID. Only accessible by Admin users

post.summary: Assign a new role to the current user
post.description: Assigns a role (Job Seeker, Employer, etc.) to the logged-in user and creates the associated profile.

delete.summary: Unassign a role from the current user
delete.description: Removes a specific role from the logged-in user. User must have at least one role remaining.

post.summary: Add a new skill to the job seeker's profile.
post.description: Requirs job seeker privileges

delete.summary: Delete a skill from the job seeker's profile

get.summary: Get all skills for a specific job seeker
get.description: Accessible by job seekers and employers
